mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_NO AS ID, U.USER_ID AS EMAIL, U.USER_NAME AS NAME, UC.USER_PWD AS PASSWORD, R.ROLE_NAME AS AUTHORITY FROM "USER" U LEFT JOIN USER_CREDENTIALS UC ON U.USER_NO = UC.USER_NO LEFT JOIN ROLE R ON U.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID WHERE UPPER(U.EMAIL) = UPPER(#{email})

SELECT U.USER_NO AS ID, U.USER_ID AS EMAIL, U.USER_NAME AS NAME, UC.USER_PWD AS PASSWORD, R.ROLE_NAME AS AUTHORITY FROM "USER" U LEFT JOIN USER_CREDENTIALS UC ON U.USER_NO = UC.USER_NO LEFT JOIN ROLE R ON U.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID WHERE U.USER_NO = #{id}

SELECT U.USER_NO AS ID, U.USER_ID AS EMAIL, U.USER_NAME AS NAME, R.ROLE_NAME AS AUTHORITY FROM "USER" U LEFT JOIN USER_IDENTITIES UI ON U.USER_NO = UI.USER_NO LEFT JOIN ROLE R ON U.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID WHERE UI.PROVIDER = #{provider} AND UI.PROVIDER_USER_NO = #{providerId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "USER" (USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_NAME, EMAIL, ROLE_ID, USER_LAN) VALUES (#{id}, #{email}, #{name}, #{email}, 1, 0)
INSERT INTO USER_IDENTITIES (IDEN_NO, USER_NO, PROVIDER, PROVIDER_USER_NO, ACCESS_TOKEN) VALUES (SEQ_USER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{accessToken})
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_IDENTITIES SET ACCESS_TOKEN = #{accessToken} WHERE PROVIDER = #{provider} AND PROVIDER_USER_NO = #{providerUserId}
